calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michele Cusack for Petitioner.

Ms. Cusack stated that she agreed with the Court's interpretation of the will. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
